title: copaiba langsdorffii
intro: Copaiba langsdorffii, also known as Copaiba, is a plant species native to the Amazon rainforest, belonging to the family Burseraceae. The Copaiba tree is valued for its resin, which possesses anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, making it a popular ingredient in herbal medicine. The health benefits of Copaiba include relief from pain, inflammation, and skin conditions, as well as potential uses in treating wounds and respiratory issues. Copaiba is often prepared as an essential oil, tincture, or salve for topical application, allowing for the extraction and utilization of its medicinal properties.
